assignments.name: Add_Fulfilled_By_Company_To_List
assignments.label: Add Fulfilled By Company To List

assignments.description: Uses the opportunity’s or account’s field values to assign field values to the order.
assignments.name: Assign_Order_Fields
assignments.label: Assign New Order Values

assignments.description: This will set the Order Id and the OrderItems Collection
assignments.name: Set_Davinci_Ids
assignments.label: Set Davinci Ids

assignments.name: Set_Error_Message_on_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Error Message on Lab Order

assignments.description: This will set the Order Id and the OrderItems Collection
assignments.name: Set_Lacore_Ids
assignments.label: Set Lacore Ids

assignments.description: For this particular vendor we set a their price book.
assignments.name: Set_Order_Price_Book_Davinci
assignments.label: Set Order Price Book - Davinci

assignments.name: Set_Vendor_Information_Davinci_Medical_USA
assignments.label: Set Vendor Information - Davinci Medical USA

assignments.description: Store in a common object to be used later in the flow
assignments.name: Store_Price_Book_Entries_Davinci
assignments.label: Store Price Book Entries - Davinci

assignments.description: Store in a common object to be used later in the flow
assignments.name: Store_Price_Book_Entries_Standard
assignments.label: Store Price Book Entries - Standard

assignments.description: We need to store the product ids to be able to do an IN query to get all fo the price book entries for these items
assignments.name: Store_Product_Ids
assignments.label: Store Product Ids

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Opportunity_Line_Items_By_Fulfilled_By
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Opportunity Line Items By Fulfilled By

collectionProcessors.description: From the above queries to get the price book entries we use this filter to find the one specific for this product and use in the below assignment.
collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Price_Book_Entry_For_Product
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Price Book Entry For Product

collectionProcessors.name: Opportunity_Line_Items_That_Don_t_Have_Fulfillment_Company
collectionProcessors.label: Opportunity Line Items That Don't Have Fulfillment Company

collectionProcessors.name: Opportunity_Line_Items_That_Have_Fulfillment_Company
collectionProcessors.label: Opportunity Line Items That Have Fulfillment Company

decisions.name: Have_We_Counted_For_This_Fulfillment_Company
decisions.label: Have We Counted For This Fulfillment Company

decisions.name: Is_the_Opportunity_Missing_a_Shipping_Address
decisions.label: Is the Opportunity Missing a Shipping Address

decisions.description: This has to be after the create products as you can't activate an order till there are products on the order.
decisions.name: Is_There_Lacore_Items_and_Order
decisions.label: Is There Lacore Items and Order

decisions.name: Is_there_Order_Products_to_Create
decisions.label: Is there Order Products to Create

decisions.description: We set specific price book for different companies
decisions.name: What_Company_Price_Book
decisions.label: What Company - Price Book

decisions.name: What_is_the_Fulfilled_By_Company
decisions.label: What is the Fulfilled By Company

Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Create Order for Fulfilled By Items {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Create Order for Fulfilled By Items

loops.name: Loop_Through_Filtered_Price_Book_Entries
loops.label: Loop Through Filtered Price Book Entries

recordCreates.description: Uses the field values that are stored in the sObject variable to create an order.
recordCreates.name: Create_Order
recordCreates.label: Create Order

recordLookups.name: Get_DocGen_Delivery_Option_Auto_Email
recordLookups.label: Get DocGen Delivery Option - Auto Email

recordLookups.description: Uses the Opportunity ID passed to the flow to look up the opportunity, and stores the selected opportunity fields in an sObject variable.
recordLookups.name: Get_Opportunity_Fields
recordLookups.label: Get Opportunity Fields

recordLookups.description: We need to get the Price Book Entries for this specific price book.
recordLookups.name: Get_Price_Book_Entries_Davinci
recordLookups.label: Get Price Book Entries - Davinci

recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_Error_No_Shipping_Address
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity - Error - No Shipping Address

recordUpdates.description: Using the rec_UpdatedOpportunity variable we will update the opportunity.
recordUpdates.name: Update_Opportunity_Record
recordUpdates.label: Update Opportunity Record

textTemplates.name: txt_MissingShippingAddressMessage
textTemplates.text:
Action Required: Missing Shipping Address This opportunity has not been sent to ShipStation because there is no shipping address on the Opportunity. Please follow the steps below to add the shipping address and complete the process:
Steps: 1. Update Opportunity Shipping Address 2. Click on the order listed on the right. 3. In the Highlight panel at the top, click on "Create Shipment". If this button is not visible, click the down arrow to reveal more options. 4. Select the appropriate shipping service from the dropdown menu. 5. Click the "Finish" button to complete the shipment process.
The order will automatically sync with ShipStation within the next hour once these steps are completed.

variables.description: This is a collection of all of the order items that are for Lacore
variables.name: col_OrderItems_Lacore

variables.description: This stores the Order Id for the Lacore Specific Order.
variables.name: rec_Order_Lacore

variables.description: A record to hold any values that need to be updated on the Opportunity.
variables.name: rec_UpdatedOpportunity

variables.description: This is a string that will have all of the different fulfillment companies that this Opportunity has
variables.name: txt_FulfillmentByCheck
